NOTICE OF AUTOMATIC STAY UNDER BUS. AND PROF. CODE SEC. 6201(C) AND CAL. RULES OF COURT RULED 225 AND 525

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONER MEIS & ASSOCIATES MOTION TO REQUEST FOR COURT SELECTION OF ARBITRATOR IS DENIED. BOTH SIDES APPEAR INTENT ON RELITIGATING ISSUES ALREADY RESOLVED. THE COURT CANNOT AND WILL NOT APPOINT A COURT COMMISSIONER TO ARBITRATE A PRIVATE ARBITRATION. THE COURT HAS ORDERED PARTIES TO SUBMIT TO ARBITRATION BEFORE A A A PURSUANT TO ITS RULES INCLUDING RULES CONCERNING SELECTION OF AN ARBITRATOR. THE COURT EXPECTS THE PARTIES TO OBEY ITS PRIOR ORDERS. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Continued To Jun-17-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: 2:33 PM
Appearances:
Ron Lunski, Esq and Andrew McClelland, Esq for Judgment Creditor Meis & Associates.
Sheila Pham, Esq (415-298-6356) Counsel for Mr. Andrew Wiecks on other matters.
Andrew Wiecks, Judgment Debtor in Pro Per.

Ms Pham, informs the Court that Mr. Wiecks has authorized Gaetani Real Estate, A Property firm in San Francisco to issue a check in the amount of $135,805.78 to satisfy the Judgment in full. Mr. Andrew Wiecks tells the Court that he does not object to the release of the funds.

2:44 pm
Court in recess while Ms. Pham verifies if a check has been prepared.

2:55 pm
Ms. Pham informs the Court that the cashier's check in the amount of $135,805.78, addressed to Mr. Ron Lunski will be released and couriered tomorrow to his office. The matter is continued to June 17, 2014 at 2:00 pm in D514 for the clearing of the check. Plaintiff to file documents that Judgment is satisfied in full, once check is cleared. The Court makes a conditional order: Mr. Andrew Wiecks is to be present on June 17, 2014 if the check does not clear. The Court orders the Deputy to release Mr. Wiecks from custody.

3:00 pm
Court adjourned.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Continued To Jun-17-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: 2:33 PM
Appearances:
Ron Lunski, Esq and Andrew McClelland, Esq for Judgment Creditor Meis & Associates.
Sheila Pham, Esq (415-298-6356) Counsel for Mr. Andrew Wiecks on other matters.
Andrew Wiecks, Judgment Debtor in Pro Per.

Ms Pham, informs the Court that Mr. Wiecks has authorized Gaetani Real Estate, A Property firm in San Francisco to issue a check in the amount of $135,805.78 to satisfy the Judgment in full. Mr. Andrew Wiecks tells the Court that he does not object to the release of the funds.

2:44 pm
Court in recess while Ms. Pham verifies if a check has been prepared.

2:55 pm
Ms. Pham informs the Court that the cashier's check in the amount of $135,805.78, addressed to Mr. Ron Lunski will be released and couriered tomorrow to his office. The matter is continued to June 17, 2014 at 2:00 pm in D514 for the clearing of the check. Plaintiff to file documents that Judgment is satisfied in full, once check is cleared. The Court makes a conditional order: Mr. Andrew Wiecks is to be present on June 17, 2014 if the check does not clear. The Court orders the Deputy to release Mr. Wiecks from custody.

3:00 pm
Court adjourned.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Continued To Jun-03-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ron Lunski, Esquire and Andrew McClelland, Esquire of Lunski Law (415-426-3525) for Meis & Associates, Judgment Creditor.
Andy Wiecks (415-926-7600), Judgment Debtor in Pro per and as Agent for service for Canal Properties.

2:15. Judgment Debtor is sworn. The judge takes the bench and asks status of the Case. Judgment Creditors report that they have not received ann answers to their 9 page questionnaire. Judgment Debtor informs the Court that he tried to get in touch with the Judgment Creditors and has left them several messages. The Court orders informs Judgment Debtor that he is in violation of the 05/13/14 Court order. He orders Mr. Wiecks to answer all the questions on the Judgment Creditors 9 page questionnaire. Judgment Debtor objects. The Court orders Mr. Wiecks to fully cooperate.

2:30 pm. The order of examination takes place without the Judge.

4:00 pm. The Judge takes the bench and inquires about the status of the case.

4:15 pm. The Court orders the Order of examination continued to June 03, 2014 (Tuesday) at 2:00 pm for further OEX proceedings. Judgment Debtor, Andrew Wiecks, is ordered present. Judgment Debtor to provide all answers to remaining question on the 9 page questionnaire at the close of business day, by 5:00 pm on Friday, May 30, 2014 by email or personal delivery to Mr. Lunski's business address.

4:25 pm. Court is adjourned.
Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D514)

MINI MINUTES:

Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. FRED MEIS, TEL. NO. 981-4612 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : PETITIONER MEIS & ASSOCIATES MOTION To Request For Court Selection Of Arbitrator IS DENIED. BOTH SIDES APPEAR INTENT ON RELITIGATING ISSUES ALREADY RESOLVED. THE COURT CANNOT AND WILL NOT APPOINT A COURT COMMISSIONER TO ARBITRATE A PRIVATE ARBITRATION. THE COURT HAS ORDERED PARTIES TO SUBMIT TO ARBITRATION BEFORE A A A PURSUANT TO ITS RULES INCLUDING RULES CONCERNING SELECTION OF AN ARBITRATOR. THE COURT EXPECTS THE PARTIES TO OBEY ITS PRIOR ORDERS. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/LB
